message:
⚠️ upgrade gh-aw v0.58.3 → v0.62.1 + add nightly version check (#2962)

Upgrade gh-aw from v0.58.3 to v0.62.1 (4 minor versions) via
`gh extension upgrade gh-aw && gh aw compile`. Breaking changes
in v0.59.0: `default-redaction` renamed to `default-safe-outputs`,
`allowed-url-domains` merged into `allowed-domains`.

Add nightly workflow that checks gh-aw version currency and opens
a GitHub issue with breaking change notes when the pinned version
falls behind the latest release.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

+name: Nightly gh-aw Version Check
+
+on:
+  schedule:
+    - cron: '0 6 * * *' # 6am UTC daily
+  workflow_dispatch: {}
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+  issues: write
+
+jobs:
+  check-version:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
+
+      - name: Check gh-aw version currency
+        env:
+          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+        run: |
+          # Extract current pinned version from actions-lock.json
+          CURRENT_VERSION=$(grep -oP '"github/gh-aw-actions/setup@v\K[^"]+' .github/aw/actions-lock.json | head -1)
+          if [ -z "$CURRENT_VERSION" ]; then
+            # Fallback to old-style path
+            CURRENT_VERSION=$(grep -oP '"github/gh-aw/actions/setup@v\K[^"]+' .github/aw/actions-lock.json | sort -V | tail -1)
+          fi
+          echo "Current version: v${CURRENT_VERSION}"
+
+          # Get latest release
+          LATEST_VERSION=$(gh release list --repo github/gh-aw --limit 1 --json tagName --jq '.[0].tagName' | sed 's/^v//')
+          echo "Latest version: v${LATEST_VERSION}"
+
+          if [ "$CURRENT_VERSION" = "$LATEST_VERSION" ]; then
+            echo "gh-aw is up to date (v${CURRENT_VERSION})"
+            exit 0
+          fi
+
+          echo "::warning::gh-aw is outdated: v${CURRENT_VERSION} → v${LATEST_VERSION}"
+
+          # Check how many minor versions behind
+          CURRENT_MINOR=$(echo "$CURRENT_VERSION" | cut -d. -f2)
+          LATEST_MINOR=$(echo "$LATEST_VERSION" | cut -d. -f2)
+          VERSIONS_BEHIND=$((LATEST_MINOR - CURRENT_MINOR))
+
+          # Get changelog highlights for breaking changes
+          BREAKING_CHANGES=""
+          for tag in $(gh release list --repo github/gh-aw --limit 10 --json tagName --jq '.[].tagName'); do
+            tag_minor=$(echo "$tag" | sed 's/^v//' | cut -d. -f2)
+            if [ "$tag_minor" -gt "$CURRENT_MINOR" ]; then
+              NOTES=$(gh release view "$tag" --repo github/gh-aw --json body --jq '.body' 2>/dev/null | grep -A1 "Breaking" | head -5)
+              if [ -n "$NOTES" ]; then
+                BREAKING_CHANGES="${BREAKING_CHANGES}\n**${tag}:**\n${NOTES}\n"
+              fi
+            fi
+          done
+
+          # Check for existing open issue
+          EXISTING=$(gh issue list --state open --label "gh-aw-update" --json number --jq '.[0].number' 2>/dev/null)
+          if [ -n "$EXISTING" ] && [ "$EXISTING" != "null" ]; then
+            echo "Existing issue #${EXISTING} already open, updating..."
+            gh issue comment "$EXISTING" --body "Version check update: still on v${CURRENT_VERSION}, latest is v${LATEST_VERSION} (${VERSIONS_BEHIND} minor versions behind)."
+            exit 0
+          fi
+
+          # Create issue
+          BODY=$(cat <<ISSUE_EOF
+          ## gh-aw Version Update Needed
+
+          | | Version |
+          |---|---------|
+          | **Current** | v${CURRENT_VERSION} |
+          | **Latest** | v${LATEST_VERSION} |
+          | **Behind** | ${VERSIONS_BEHIND} minor version(s) |
+
+          ### Action Required
+
+          1. Upgrade CLI: \`gh extension upgrade gh-aw\`
+          2. Recompile: \`cd /tmp/kubestellar-console && gh aw compile\`
+          3. Run post-compile patch: \`bash .github/aw/patch-lock-files.sh\`
+          4. Test locally, then commit + PR
+
+          ### Breaking Changes Since v${CURRENT_VERSION}
+          $(echo -e "$BREAKING_CHANGES" | head -30)
+
+          ---
+          *Auto-generated by nightly gh-aw version check*
+          ISSUE_EOF
+          )
+
+          gh issue create \
+            --title "⚠️ gh-aw outdated: v${CURRENT_VERSION} → v${LATEST_VERSION}" \
+            --body "$BODY" \
+            --label "gh-aw-update,dependencies,triage/accepted"
